issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to Gemini CLI and does not work with other AI agents.
Downloading and executing installer script from GitHub without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Whole-codebase circular dependency analysis
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for madge/depcruise generic tools; treatment uses gemini --model gemini-2.5-pro with the 1M-token whole-codebase prompt and GEMINI.md auto-loading from the skill.

scenarios.name: Multi-modal QA screenshot triage
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to Python SDK or web UI; treatment uses the exact gemini --image bug1.png --image bug2.png one-shot pattern documented in the skill.
